Package org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli

Class AbstractCommand

java.lang.Object
org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli.AbstractCommand
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, Command
Direct Known Subclasses:
BaseCommand
public abstract class AbstractCommand extends Object implements Command
Default class for new shell commands. The name and a brief description of the command are required. The command can access to the virtual terminal used by the shell, if needed.

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Description copied from interface: Command
      Gets a brief explanation of what the command does. More detailed information should be provided with Command.printHelp(java.io.PrintWriter).
      Specified by:
      getDescription in interface Command
      Returns:
      a short description of the command
